hero.headline: JAIN Online MBA in AI for Finance: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) Online MBA with an AI for Finance specialisation. NIRF #62 University, NAAC A++, UGC-DEB approved. AI for Business Decision Making, AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation, AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection, Predictive Financial Modelling, Fintech Innovations, and Tech-Driven M&A in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: JAIN Online MBA AI for Finance: NIRF #62, NAAC A++, fees Rs 1.75L-1.96L (3 payment options), 4 scholarship categories. AI-finance convergence curriculum with Corporate Finance AI, Risk and Fraud Detection AI, Predictive Financial Modelling, Blockchain and RPA Fintech, and Tech-Driven M&A. Strongest JAIN finance spec for AI-forward banking, fintech, and corporate finance roles.

about.body:
The JAIN Online MBA in AI for Finance is offered by JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Bengaluru. JAIN holds NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #62 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #73 in Management. The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The AI for Finance specialisation delivers an AI-finance convergence curriculum in Sem 3-4: AI for Business Decision Making, Strategic Management in the AI Era, AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation, AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection, Psychology of Leadership, and Design Thinking and Product Development as Sem 3 subjects. Sem 4 covers AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management, Fintech Innovations: Blockchain, RPA and Beyond, Predictive Financial Modelling for Business Decisions, Tech-Driven M&A and Corporate Restructuring, Emerging Tech in Business, and Research / Project.

This specialisation is positioned at the intersection of corporate finance and applied AI. Finance professionals at banks, fintech startups, and investment firms who want to lead AI-enabled transformation rather than just manage traditional finance functions will find this curriculum directly targeted at their career trajectory. The DeFi, blockchain, RPA, and predictive modelling coverage makes this the most forward-looking finance spec in JAIN's portfolio.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Research Methods
sem3Subjects.description: Apply quantitative research design and financial data analysis to AI in finance research projects and model validation studies.

sem3Subjects.name: AI for Business Decision Making
sem3Subjects.description: Apply AI decision frameworks, GenAI tools, and robotic process automation to financial analysis and business operations.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management in the AI Era
sem3Subjects.description: Evaluate AI-driven competitive disruption, design AI transformation roadmaps, and position financial services firms in AI-enabled markets.

sem3Subjects.name: AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation
sem3Subjects.description: Apply ML-assisted financial modeling, AI-driven equity valuation, and algorithmic scenario analysis to corporate finance decisions.

sem3Subjects.name: AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection
sem3Subjects.description: Deploy predictive fraud detection models, apply AI-based credit risk scoring, and implement digital forensics frameworks for BFSI.

sem3Subjects.name: Psychology of Leadership
sem3Subjects.description: Apply behavioural science and leadership psychology to lead AI-driven finance transformation teams and manage change resistance.

sem3Subjects.name: Design Thinking and Product Development / Business Law in the Digital Age
sem3Subjects.description: Apply design thinking to fintech product development and understand digital business law for regulatory compliance in AI finance.

sem4Subjects.name: AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management
sem4Subjects.description: Lead organisational AI adoption, manage workforce transformation, and build AI governance frameworks for financial institutions.

sem4Subjects.name: Fintech Innovations: Blockchain, RPA and Beyond
sem4Subjects.description: Evaluate blockchain payment infrastructure, DeFi applications, RPA in banking operations, and emerging fintech platform economics.

sem4Subjects.name: Predictive Financial Modelling for Business Decisions
sem4Subjects.description: Build ML-assisted financial forecasting models, apply time-series prediction to revenue planning, and automate scenario analysis.

sem4Subjects.name: Tech-Driven M&A and Corporate Restructuring
sem4Subjects.description: Apply AI-assisted due diligence, comparable company analysis, and technology-driven deal structuring for M&A advisory roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Emerging Tech in Business
sem4Subjects.description: Evaluate AI, IoT, and digital twin applications for financial operations, treasury management, and enterprise risk monitoring.

sem4Subjects.name: Research / Project (Earn While You Learn)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied AI in finance project on predictive credit scoring, fraud detection, or fintech product strategy.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all JAIN MBA specialisations. See the main JAIN Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
AI for Finance MBA graduates from JAIN Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Fintech startups, BFSI AI teams, Investment banking technology, Corporate treasury transformation, Risk and compliance technology, Digital banking

**Entry-level roles:** Fintech Business Analyst, Credit Risk Analyst, Financial Data Analyst, AI in Banking Analyst, Corporate Finance Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** AI Finance Manager, Fintech Product Manager, Risk Technology Manager, Corporate Finance AI Lead, Treasury Transformation Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CFO Digital, Head of Fintech Innovation, VP Risk Technology, Chief AI Officer (Finance), Director Corporate Finance Transformation

**Top hiring organisations:** HDFC Bank AI Lab, ICICI Bank Digital, Axis Bank Fintech, Paytm, PhonePe, Razorpay, Groww, Zerodha Tech, Deloitte Finance Technology, EY Fintech, KPMG Risk Technology, Goldman Sachs India, Morgan Stanley India Technology

skills.body:
The JAIN AI for Finance specialisation builds skills at the AI-finance intersection that banks, fintech firms, and corporate finance teams seek at manager level:

**Technical skills:**
- AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation: ML-assisted financial modeling, AI-driven equity valuation, and algorithmic scenario analysis for corporate finance and investment banking roles
- AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection: predictive fraud detection model deployment, AI credit risk scoring, and digital forensics for BFSI risk and compliance teams
- Predictive Financial Modelling: ML-assisted revenue forecasting, time-series prediction, and automated financial scenario analysis for FP&A and corporate planning
- Fintech Innovations: blockchain payment system evaluation, DeFi application assessment, and RPA banking operations management for fintech product and innovation roles

**Applied skills:**
- Tech-Driven M&A: AI-assisted due diligence, comparable analysis automation, and technology-led deal structuring for investment banking and M&A advisory
- AI for Business Decision Making: GenAI tools for financial analysis, RPA deployment in treasury operations, and AI governance for financial decision-making

**Soft skills:** Building AI business cases for CFO and board approval, managing fintech vendor evaluation, leading AI transformation in traditional finance teams, and communicating model risk to audit committees.

comparisons.body:
Comparing JAIN Online MBA AI for Finance against peers:

**vs JAIN Finance (standard) within the same university:** JAIN Finance covers investment analysis, banking, fintech, wealth management, and risk management through traditional subject frameworks. JAIN AI for Finance replaces traditional finance subjects with AI-augmented versions: AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation, AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection, Predictive Financial Modelling, and Blockchain and RPA Fintech. Students targeting AI-driven transformation roles should choose AI for Finance. Students targeting traditional banking, wealth management, or corporate finance should choose Finance.

**vs Amity Online MBA Finance:** Amity Finance at Rs 2,25,000 covers corporate finance, investment management, and banking without an AI-forward curriculum. JAIN AI for Finance delivers AI-in-finance subject coverage not available in Amity's finance track. For AI-driven fintech, risk technology, and corporate finance transformation roles, JAIN AI for Finance is the more targeted option.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Financial Management:** NMIMS Financial Management carries strong Mumbai BFSI brand recognition at Rs 1,60,000-1,95,000 without dedicated AI finance subjects. For traditional Mumbai banking careers, NMIMS remains stronger. For Bengaluru fintech, AI risk management, and corporate finance transformation roles, JAIN AI for Finance delivers unique subject coverage.

fees.body:
The JAIN Online MBA in AI for Finance is priced between Rs 1,75,000 and Rs 1,96,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year program). JAIN offers different fee tiers based on specialisation - contact our counsellor for exact fee for this specific specialisation.

**Payment options (3 ways)**:

- **Semester-wise**: Rs 43,750 per semester (Tier 1) or Rs 49,000 per semester (Tier 2)
- **Yearly**: Rs 87,500 per year (Tier 1) or Rs 98,000 per year (Tier 2)
- **One-time upfront**: Rs 1,75,000 (Tier 1) or Rs 1,96,000 (Tier 2)

**Additional charges (Indian students)**:
- Registration fee: Rs 2,500 one-time
- Examination fee: Rs 3,000 per year (Rs 6,000 total for 2 years)

**Total effective cost (Indian student)**:
- Tier 1 specs: Rs 1,83,500
- Tier 2 specs: Rs 2,04,500

**International student fees**:
- SAARC countries: additional Rs 11,250 registration + Rs 3,750 per year exam fee
- Other international students: USD 150 registration + USD 50 per year exam fee

**EMI options**: Available through JAIN's direct NBFC lending partner tie-ups (same pattern as LPU and MUJ - not through external marketing partners). Contact our counsellor for current EMI tenure options, approval terms, and whether zero-cost or interest-bearing.

**Scholarships available** (4 categories - specific discount % and eligibility varies by admission cycle):
- **Merit-based**: Academic excellence scholarship for qualifying marks
- **Armed Forces**: Support for serving/veteran military personnel and families
- **Gender-focused**: Empowerment scholarship for diverse applicants
- **Freshers**: Transition support for recent undergraduates

Specific discount percentages are confirmed at admission based on eligibility. Contact our counsellor for current cycle scholarship details.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with JAIN each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees, scholarship eligibility, and EMI terms with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) and carries the JAIN name with the MBA designation. The AI for Finance specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from JAIN Online MBA AI for Finance alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Vivek Krishnaswamy
items.liked: AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation was directly applicable to my role at a Bengaluru fintech. Predictive Financial Modelling helped me build automated revenue forecasts that replaced manual Excel models. Blockchain and RPA subject was unique.
items.disliked: Psychology of Leadership felt out of place in an AI finance curriculum - could be replaced with a dedicated AI ethics in finance module.
items.body: I was in corporate finance for 5 years and wanted to move to AI-driven roles. The JAIN AI for Finance MBA gave me the positioning I needed. Bengaluru fintech firms responded well to the AI finance credential combined with my work experience.

items.name: Lakshmi Narayan
items.liked: AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection was outstanding. Directly applicable to my risk technology role at a Hyderabad bank. Fintech Innovations gave good DeFi and blockchain grounding.
items.disliked: Tech-Driven M&A subject was conceptual rather than applied. More live deal case studies would strengthen it.
items.body: Good programme for Hyderabad BFSI AI careers. The AI finance combination is rare in online MBA programmes at this fee range. Self-supplementation with Python and ML courses alongside the MBA is recommended for full technical depth.

items.name: Rajan Pillai
items.liked: AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management was helpful for presenting AI transformation to senior finance management.
items.disliked: The AI content assumes business management audience rather than technical depth. For technical ML engineering, additional specialised courses needed.
items.body: Good credential for finance managers moving into AI-driven roles. Not suitable for those wanting deep technical ML engineering. Positioned well for business-side AI leadership in finance functions.

faqs.question: How are JAIN fees different for different specializations?
faqs.answer: JAIN offers two pricing tiers across its MBA specialisations. Tier 1 is Rs 1,75,000 total (plus Rs 2,500 registration and Rs 6,000 examination fees). Tier 2 is Rs 1,96,000 total (same additional charges). The tier applicable to the AI for Finance specialisation should be confirmed with our counsellor as tier assignment can change across admission cycles.

faqs.question: What scholarships does JAIN offer for Online MBA?
faqs.answer: JAIN offers 4 scholarship categories: Merit-based (academic excellence), Armed Forces (military personnel and families), Gender-focused (diversity empowerment), and Freshers (recent graduates). Specific discount percentages and eligibility conditions are confirmed at admission and vary by intake cycle. Contact our counsellor for current cycle details.

faqs.question: Does JAIN offer dual specialization in Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. For finance-focused students, JAIN offers Finance and Business Analytics (dual) and Finance and Marketing (dual) as dedicated dual-spec programmes. Students who want AI finance depth combined with a second domain can explore these options with our counsellor during admission.

faqs.question: What is the difference between JAIN AI for Finance and JAIN Finance?
faqs.answer: JAIN Finance covers traditional corporate finance, investment analysis, banking, fintech, wealth management, and risk management. JAIN AI for Finance covers AI-augmented versions of these same domains: AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation, AI-Driven Risk Management, Predictive Financial Modelling, and Blockchain and RPA Fintech. Students targeting AI transformation roles in finance should choose AI for Finance.

faqs.question: Does JAIN AI for Finance prepare students for fintech startups?
faqs.answer: Yes. Fintech Innovations: Blockchain, RPA and Beyond, AI for Business Decision Making, and Predictive Financial Modelling are directly applicable to fintech startup product, risk, and analytics roles. JAIN's Bengaluru location also gives strong alumni connectivity to South India's large fintech startup ecosystem in Bengaluru and Hyderabad.

chooseIf: You are a finance professional targeting AI-driven transformation roles at banks, fintech startups, or corporate finance teams.
You want dedicated AI in Corporate Finance, Fraud Detection AI, Predictive Financial Modelling, and Blockchain subjects in one MBA.
You want 3 flexible payment options and 4 scholarship categories at fees of Rs 1.75L-1.96L.
consider: If ACCA professional qualification alongside AI finance is the goal, JAIN's AI for International Finance specialisation covers similar ACCA-aligned subjects with an AI analytics overlay.
If traditional banking, wealth management, or investment analysis without AI focus is the target, JAIN Finance specialisation provides more domain depth.
If pan-India BFSI brand recognition is the priority, NMIMS Online MBA Financial Management at Rs 1.6L-1.95L carries stronger Mumbai banking recognition.
